jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, API Platform
jobs.content:
We are looking for a senior software engineer to build and scale our API platform.

  • 5+ years experience in backend systems
  • Proficiency in Python, Go, or Rust
  • Experience with distributed systems at scale

jobs.title: Research Scientist, Alignment
jobs.content: Join our alignment team to work on ensuring AI systems are safe, honest, and beneficial. You will conduct original research on scalable alignment techniques and publish findings.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Enterprise
jobs.content: Lead product strategy for enterprise customers. Define roadmaps, coordinate cross-functional teams, and drive adoption of Claude for business use cases.
